device_name: Xeleris V Processing and Review System
intended_use: The system is intended for use by Nuclear Medicine (NM) or Radiology practitioners and referring physicians for display, processing, archiving, printing, reporting and networking of NMI data, includin
intended_use_full: The system is intended for use by Nuclear Medicine (NM) or Radiology practitioners and referring physicians for display, processing, archiving, printing, reporting and networking of NMI data, including planar scans (Static, Whole Body, Dynamic, Multi-Gated) and tomographic scans (SPECT, Gated SPECT, dedicated PET or Camera-Based-PET) acquired by gamma cameras or PET scanners.
target_condition: Multiple conditions including Parkinson disease (via DaTQUANT), Pulmonary Embolism, COPD, Emphysema, Epilepsy, Dementia, Alzheimer's disease, Stroke, Coronary Artery Disease, Bone metastases from prostate cancer
ground_truth: Representative clinical datasets for Q.Thera AI and Generate Planar testing
other_metrics: Bench testing demonstrated correctness of radiation dose calculations across different combinations of models, organs, and isotopes; similarity demonstrated between derived planar images from SPECT-only vs SPECT-CT studies across factors including body region and BMI
